storage.notes: Ships with a 16GB microSD card (ring-buffer storage, oldest recordings overwritten by default). Also supports FTP and the optional INSTAR Cloud.

features: 4x optical zoom with autofocus — the only camera in the legacy Full HD line with true optical (not just digital) zoom
pan/tilt with PTZ controller for smooth movement
integrated PIR sensor, 4 configurable alarm areas
note: motion detection/PIR is disabled while the camera is actively panning/tilting/zooming
ships with both wall and ceiling mounting brackets

frigate.notes: RTSP path confirmed via a community forum report (rtsp://{address}:{port}/11), reported to work without INSTAR's proxy/gateway service. Only a single numbered stream is confirmed; a lower-resolution substream number was not identified. ONVIF support not confirmed for this legacy model.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF support unconfirmed for this legacy model; the community-confirmed RTSP URL above works with the generic RTSP/MJPEG camera integration.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model, but the confirmed RTSP URL should work with a generic RTSP camera profile.
